codeReview.summary: The feature adds a dedicated co-located test suite for assertion insertion/deduplication logic and satisfies the stated objective of raising assertion-apply-insertion coverage above the 80% statement target. Diff scope is limited to tests, and coverage evidence in the handoff indicates 95.74% statement coverage for the target module with quality gates passing.

summary: Reviewed commit 667cdfe484f2513fa8663ac7afa47517e124fce0 for feature coverage-assertion-apply-insertion: dedicated tests were added at src/core/improve/assertion-apply/assertion-apply-insertion.test.ts, transcript skeleton and handoff are consistent, and no blocking or non-blocking issues were found for the feature requirements.
